# Skill: Mass-Spectral-Library-Curation

Reusable computational step covering mass-spectral-library-curation.

## How to import

Drop this directory into your agent's skill-library path. The skill body is
`skill.md`; supporting docs are listed in `skill_kb.json`. Tool dependencies
are in `tools.json`. No external services or MCP required.

```bash
cp -r mass-spectral-library-curation/ /path/to/your/agent/skills/
```

## Files in this bundle

- `skill.md` — markdown body (load into agent prompt)
- `skill_kb.json` — manifest of cached supporting docs (`docs/`)
- `tools.json` — JSON list of SciTool records this skill depends on (added by T22)
- `docs/` — cached READMEs, source files, examples, doc pages
